_meta.name: pillar-library kid-archetype taxonomy
_meta.designPrinciple: Population-adjusted weighting: the library mirrors a globally blended kid population rather than a curated inclusion showcase. Features occur incidentally at natural rates and are never the identity — the vibe is the identity. Photo matching is local-only (CLIP cosine in browser); this file is the pillar library.

seedSearch.rule: first seed in [base, base+499] whose realized 150-sample marginals satisfy the guardrails

weights.coverageFloor: 1 archetype seeded per (skinTone x hairTexture) cell (24 cells) before weighted sampling of the remaining 126 — guarantees the CLIP-match library has no empty cell while keeping population weighting for the bulk

archetypes.dnaPrompt: A young girl with warm tan-brown skin, a round face, warm dimpled cheeks, and warm brown eyes. Black hair, full of springy curls, falling in ringlets to the ears. Dressed in an oversized cable-knit cardigan. Wears mint-green round glasses. Signature accessory: a well-loved picture book.

A school-age girl with deep ebony skin with cool undertones, an oval face, warm dimpled cheeks, and warm brown eyes. Black hair, tightly coiled, in long box braids with bead tips. Dressed in a bandana and denim jacket. Signature accessory: an upturned tin pot.

A school-age girl with rich deep-brown skin, an oval face, sun-warmed cheeks, and deep brown eyes. Dark brown hair, softly wavy, in twin braids. Dressed in scuffed jeans and a grass-stained tee. Wears cherry-red round glasses. Signature accessory: a leafy twig tucked behind one ear.

A young boy with fair peachy skin with warm undertones, an oval face, sun-warmed cheeks, and bright blue eyes. Light brown hair, full of springy curls, in a bouncy crop. Dressed in a band tee and soft corduroys. Signature accessory: a shiny harmonica.

A toddler boy with rich deep-brown skin, a soft square face, soft rosy cheeks, and warm brown eyes. Brown hair, full of springy curls, in a curly mop with a side part. Dressed in a swishy practice skirt over leggings. Signature accessory: ballet slippers slung over one shoulder.
